upload.title: Load Data
upload.sampleDatasetsDesc: Explore and load curated example datasets
upload.uploadFileDesc: Upload local files (CSV, TSV, JSON, Excel)
upload.pasteDataDesc: Paste tabular data directly from clipboard
upload.extractDataDesc: Find, extract, and load data with AI
upload.loadFromUrlDesc: Load data from a URL with optional auto-refresh
upload.databaseDesc: Connect to databases or data services
upload.databaseDisabled: Database connection is disabled in this environment
upload.supportedFormats: Supported: CSV, TSV, JSON, Excel (xlsx, xls)

placeholder.paste: Paste your data here (CSV, TSV, or JSON format)

helperText.urlInvalid: Enter a valid URL starting with http://, https://, or /

upload.previewMode: Preview mode: Editing disabled. Click "Show Full" to enable editing.
upload.orConnectToDataSource: Or connect to a data source (with optional auto-refresh)
upload.addConnectionDesc: Connect to a new database or data service
upload.pickDataSourceType: Choose a data source type to create a new connection.
upload.browserTooltip: Data stays in browser only (limited to {{limit}} rows)
upload.installLocallyTooltip: Install Data Formulator locally to unlock analysis for large datasets
upload.azureBlobTooltip: Data stored in Azure Blob Storage (supports large tables)
upload.diskTooltip: Data stored in workspace on disk (supports large tables)
upload.fileUploadDisabled: File upload is disabled in this environment.
upload.useLoadFromUrl: Use "Load from URL" to load data from a remote source.
upload.urlFormatHint: The URL must point to data in CSV, JSON, or JSONL format
upload.watchHint: automatically check and refresh data from the URL at regular intervals
upload.enterUrlToPreview: Enter a URL and click Preview to see data.
upload.contentExceedsSizeLimit: ⚠️ Content exceeds {{limit}}MB size limit. Current size: {{size}}MB. Please use the DATABASE tab for large datasets.
upload.localFolderDesc: Connect to a local folder for fast imports
upload.localFolderHint: Select a folder on your computer to browse and import data files.
upload.storedInAzure: Data stored in Azure Blob Storage

connectorDesc.mysql: Query tables from a MySQL database
connectorDesc.postgresql: Query tables from a PostgreSQL database
connectorDesc.mssql: Query tables from Microsoft SQL Server
connectorDesc.cosmosdb: Query containers from Azure Cosmos DB
connectorDesc.kusto: Query data from Azure Data Explorer (Kusto)
connectorDesc.azure_blob: Load files from Azure Blob Storage
connectorDesc.local_folder: Browse and import files from a local folder

errors.fileTooLarge: File {{name}} is too large ({{size}}MB). Use Database for large files.
errors.unableToParseUrl: Unable to parse data from the provided URL. Please ensure the URL points to CSV, JSON, or JSONL data.
errors.failedToFetch: Failed to fetch data: {{message}}. Please ensure the URL points to CSV, JSON, or JSONL data.
